result:
Successfully cleaned and harmonized parental NS-SEC occupational class variables across all 5 waves. The script:

1. Loaded all 5 tab-delimited files from data/input/
2. Selected and renamed variables to nssecma14-18 (mothers) and nssecpa14-18 (fathers)
3. Harmonized NS-SEC classification by taking integer part (categories 1-17)
4. Harmonized missing value codes:
   - -999 → -2 (Script error/information lost)
   - -94 → -8 (Don't know/insufficient information)
   - -99, -98 → -3 (Not asked/not interviewed)
5. Merged all waves using full_join by NSID
6. Converted all NS-SEC variables to labelled factors with explicit labels
7. Output contains 11 variables (NSID + 10 NS-SEC variables) and 16,111 rows
8. Written to data/output/cleaned_data.csv
